title: Signal collected
detail: The scheduled ingestion task normalizes an official AI ecosystem update into a durable signal record with source, topic, subscription priority, and collector telemetry.

title: Insight verified
detail: The insight layer builds an evidence pack, extracts claims, classifies support, and decides which downstream actions are allowed or blocked.

title: Strategic synthesis updated
detail: Knowledge synthesis updates Radar, Agent Watch, and project relevance while keeping reflection as context, not evidence.

title: Review path created
detail: The Project Engine creates a reviewable Project Takeaway candidate instead of an automatic action, preserving verification metadata for Review Records and Calibration Events.
